positive: Stylized, retro-futuristic neon vaporwave cityscape silhouette against a vibrant sunset gradient of magenta, teal, and electric purple. The scene features towering skyscrapers, stylized palm trees, and abstract geometric patterns rendered in clean, thick linework. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, emphasizing strong contrasts between deep, cool shadows and bright, saturated neon glows. Perfect for an apparel print with a clean, graphic feel. Flat vector art aesthetic, distressed screen print texture, UHD, high contrast, clean lines, vibrant saturation.
